calendar.matters:
Petn. For Trustee'S Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-22-2006 Text Ruling

Petn. For Trustee'S Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-07-2006 Continued To Sep-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. For Trustee'S Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Continued To Sep-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Frankston and John Leutza appearing for and with petitioner Steven David. James Barringer appearing for trustee Anthony David. Status reported by Mr. Barringer. Mediation did not go forward. Steven David does not want to buyout his brother at this time. He wants to list the property for sale. Mr. Frankston is not asking for removal of the trustee at this time. He is asking for the trustee to return trustee fees and attorney fees. Mr. Barringer wants an hearing. Mr. Frankston wants to submit it on paper. Court is setting an evidentary hearing on 9/15 at 9am. The trustee to file his pleadings by 7/27. Response by 8/2 and reply by 8/9. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petn. For Trustee'S Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-14-2006 Continued To Jul-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: James Barringer appearing for trustee Anthony David. Counsel informs the court that the trustee has provided an accounting to the beneficiaries. He has not received any objections to the accounting. Judd Iversen appearing late for Steven David. Parties are trying to work on a buyout. They are looking into private mediation. Matter is continued to 7/12 for status. Judge: Raymond J. Arata, Jr.. Reporter: Floyd Butler, CSR#2518. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petn. For Trustee'S Accounting
Off Calendar May-10-2006 Continued To Jun-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Andrew Zabronsky appearing for trustee. Judd Iverson and John Leutza appearing for petitioner. Status of case reported by Mr. Zabronsky. New pleading was filed last Friday by petitioner. The 21320 petition in another matter is not off calendar. Mr. Zabronsky will file his petition within one week. He wants to conduct discovery. The trustee has provided an accounting to the petitioner. Counsel wants counsel to talk about the accounting. Matter is continued to 6/14 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petn. For Trustee'S Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Continued To May-10-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN LEUTZA FOR AND WITH STEVEN DAVID; ANDREW ZABRONSKY FOR ANTHONY DAVID. PARTIES PRESENT ARGUMENT. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO MAY 10,2006 AT 10;30 AM.
